_rolesNote: Covers the Snake-Eye + Yummy hybrid fixture: (a) 6 Snake-Eye core cards (Ash, Oak, Poplar, Flamberge, Diabellstar, Divine Temple), (b) Bonfire as alt ignition, (c) 8 Yummy engine pieces (Mignon, Cupsy, Cooky, Marshmao, Snatchy, Cupsy★Way, Cooky★Way, Lollipo★Way, Acroquey, Yummy Surprise), (d) Link-1 pivots (Linkuriboh, Almiraj). Authored from mechanical-bridges-catalog-2026-04-23.md drafts (4 Snake-Eye bridges + Cupsy★Way synchro + Doomed Dragon alt-SS).

goals.name: Snake-Eye Yummy canonical endboard (Lollipo + Flamberge + Rabbit + 4 backrow)
goals.description: The fixture-expected 7-piece endboard: Lollipo★Yummy Way + Flamberge Dragon + Silhouhatte Rabbit on monster zones, plus Yummy Surprise + Azurune + I:P Masquerena + Divine Temple set. This is the post-replay reference state for snake-eye-yummy-opener from the Hollywood WCQ deck. Represents the full combo fired: Snake-Eye ignition → Link-1 → Cupsy★Way synchro → Yummy tutor chain → Lollipo pivot + Flamberge GY-SS + trap/quick-effect layer.

required.note: I:P Masquerena set (via quick-effect link summon window)

goals.name: Three-body waypoint — Lollipo + Flamberge + Rabbit on field
goals.description: Mid-combo apex: the three terminal monsters summoned (Lollipo via Cupsy★Way synchro, Flamberge via GY-SS / Link pivot, Rabbit as generic extender). Indicates the full summoning chain fired. Traps + field spell not yet required — those trail from Yummy Surprise tutor + Divine Temple activation. Reaches canonical apex via bridge.

goals.name: Cupsy★Yummy Way synchro-summoned (tutors 2 Yummy from deck)
goals.description: Phase B waypoint — Cupsy★Yummy Way synchro'd via the Link-1-as-Tuner clause (Linkuriboh or Almiraj or Yummy★Snatchy + any Lv1 non-Tuner). CW.1 tutors 2 Yummy cards from deck; this is the Yummy engine ignition point. Route from Snake-Eye side: Ash/Poplar/Bonfire ignition → Link-1 pivot → Cupsy★Way. Waypoint, not apex.

goals.name: Poplar self-SS'd (ignition succeeded, 2 Lv1 FIRE bodies available)
goals.description: Entry waypoint: Poplar has self-SS'd via its on-add-to-hand-not-drawn clause (SeP.1). Either from NS Ash → search Poplar path, or from Bonfire → add Poplar alt path. Produces a Lv1 FIRE body on field — the foundation for Link-1 pivots into Cupsy★Way. Scores the moment the ignition bridge completes, independent of what's built on top.

goals.name: Any Snake-Eye body on field (exploration gradient)
goals.description: Partial-credit signal: any Snake-Eye core monster is face-up on the field. Rewards DFS for progressing into Snake-Eye territory even before Poplar-level waypoints resolve. Covers Ash-on-field before search resolves, Flamberge Link-summoned directly, Oak recursion, etc.

goals.name: Divine Temple active (field spell enabler for engine loops)
goals.description: Partial-credit signal: Divine Temple of the Snake-Eye is face-up in the field zone. Enables DT.1 (face-up S/T zone Snake-Eye → SS a Snake-Eye from hand/deck) and DT.2 (search Snake-Eye from deck). Signals the recursion engine is online.

required.note: Divine Temple of the Snake-Eye face-up in field zone

goals.name: Flamberge or Doomed Dragon on field (engine terminal)
goals.description: Waypoint-to-apex partial: Flamberge Dragon OR Snake-Eyes Doomed Dragon is face-up on field. Either is a valid terminal finisher for the Snake-Eye engine — Flamberge via Link/GY-SS chain, Doomed Dragon via alt-SS (2 face-up S/T zone monsters → send to GY → SS self). Bridges to the canonical apex when combined with Yummy engine outputs.

routes.name: NS Ash → add Poplar → Poplar self-SS

steps.note: NS Snake-Eye Ash (Lv1 FIRE). Triggers SeA.1 on-NS/SS add-Lv1-FIRE from deck.
SeA.1: add Snake-Eyes Poplar (Lv1 FIRE Pyro) from Deck to hand
SeP.1: Poplar on-add-to-hand-not-drawn → SS self (condition `not IsReason(REASON_DRAW)` mechanically confirmed)

routes.name: Activate Bonfire → add Poplar → Poplar self-SS (preserves NS)

steps.note: Activate Bonfire (OPT, Pyro-family search). Generic Lv4-or-lower Pyro from Deck.
Bonfire: add Poplar (Lv1 Pyro) from Deck. Alternative to NS Ash path — preserves Normal Summon for Acroquey/Mignon NS.
SeP.1: Poplar on-add-to-hand-not-drawn → SS self

routes.name: Poplar already in hand → no-action self-SS

steps.note: Poplar's on-add-to-hand-not-drawn clause fires on hand-arrival from deck searches. When drawn opening hand, the condition `not IsReason(REASON_DRAW)` blocks direct self-SS — requires re-adding via a search (bounce to deck then re-search). V1 placeholder: route starts from Poplar-in-hand assumes a prior tutor event placed it there.

synergies.effect: Canonical 1-card ignition: NS Ash searches Lv1 FIRE → Poplar → Poplar's on-add-to-hand-not-drawn clause triggers self-SS. Produces 2 Lv1 FIRE bodies on field from 1 Normal Summon. Mechanically confirmed via edge enumeration (Ash.e1 → Poplar.e1).

Alt ignition: Bonfire adds Poplar; Poplar self-SS's the same way. Advantage over NS Ash: Normal Summon preserved for Acroquey or Mignon turn-1 Normal Summon pivots. Surfaced by mechanical discovery, not manually authored.

Snake-Eye recursion engine: Ash.e3 ignition sends 2 face-up cards incl. self to GY → SS any non-Ash Snake-Eye from hand/deck. Oak.e1 then tutors Lv1 FIRE from GY. Flamberge.e3 on-sent-to-GY SS's 2 Lv1 FIRE from own GY — cascades remaining Poplar/Ash/Oak triggers. Full loop: Ash → Oak → Flamberge → 2 bodies back.

Cupsy★Yummy Way Synchro non-standard procedure: accepts Link-1 as Lv1 Tuner (via EFFECT_SYNCHRO_LEVEL effect). Means Linkuriboh / Almiraj / Yummy★Snatchy (all Link-1s in ED) + any Lv1 non-Tuner = Lv2 Synchro. Primary Snake-Eye → Yummy bridge. Mechanically decoded from Synchro.AddProcedure args + EFFECT_SYNCHRO_LEVEL detection.

Divine Temple as Snake-Eye continuous-spell backbone: Poplar SeP.3 places a FIRE monster face-up in S/T zone (which DT can then reference). DT.1 consumes a face-up Snake-Eye in S/T → SS a Snake-Eye from hand/deck. Enables end-of-turn board refill and mid-combo body generation.

Doomed Dragon alt-SS path: needs 2 face-up monsters in own S/T zone → send to GY → SS self. Snake-Eye engine naturally places monsters face-up in S/T zones (Poplar SeP.3, Flamberge, Divine Temple effects). ED finisher alternative when standard summon routes are blocked.

bridges.name: NS Ash → Poplar self-SS via add-to-hand trigger
bridges.description: Snake-Eye canonical 1-card opener. NS Ash triggers SeA.1 (on-NS/SS) to add a Lv1 FIRE from Deck; Poplar is the standard pick. Poplar's added-to-hand-not-drawn clause (SeP.1, filter confirmed via condition `not IsReason(REASON_DRAW)`) triggers self-SS. Produces 2 Lv1 FIRE on field — enables Link-1 (Linkuriboh/Almiraj) + Lv2 Synchro pivots.

steps.note: NS Snake-Eye Ash
SeA.1: add Poplar (Lv1 FIRE) from Deck to hand
SeP.1: Poplar added-to-hand-not-drawn → SS self

bridges.name: Activate Bonfire → Poplar self-SS (NS-free ignition)
bridges.description: Alternative 1-card Snake-Eye ignition discovered mechanically. Bonfire is a generic Pyro-family search spell (add 1 Lv4-or-lower Pyro from Deck) — Poplar qualifies (Lv1 Pyro FIRE). Added-to-hand-not-drawn triggers Poplar's SS clause. Value: NS is preserved (vs snake-eye-ash-1card-ignition-bridge which requires NS Ash). Enables same Link-1 + Synchro pivots without spending the turn's Normal Summon.

steps.note: Activate Bonfire (OPT)
Bonfire: add Poplar (Lv1 Pyro) from Deck
SeP.1: Poplar on-add-to-hand-not-drawn → SS self

bridges.name: Ash.e3 ignition → SS Oak → Oak.e1 tutor Lv1 FIRE from GY
bridges.description: Recursion bridge. Ash.e3 (ignition, MZONE): send 2 face-up cards including self to GY → SS 1 Snake-Eye (not Ash) from hand/Deck. Target = Oak (Lv1 FIRE Snake-Eye). Oak lands → triggers Oak.e1 (on-NS/SS): target Lv1 FIRE in GY → Ash is in GY (just sent as cost) → SS or add to hand. Multiple high-confidence edges detected (Ash.e3 → Oak.e1/e2, Oak.e3 → Ash.e1/e2) via CATEGORY_SPECIAL_SUMMON pair match.

produces.note: Oak on field (from Ash ignition SS target)

steps.note: Activate Ash.e3 on field; cost = send 2 face-up cards incl. Ash self to GY
Ash.e3 resolve: SS Oak (Lv1 FIRE Snake-Eye, non-Ash) from hand/deck
Oak.e1 on-NS/SS: target Ash in GY → add to hand or SS (Ash was just sent via Ash.e3 cost)

bridges.name: Flamberge sent-to-GY → SS 2 Lv1 FIRE from GY
bridges.description: Turn-2+ recovery / in-combo refill. Flamberge sent from hand/field to GY triggers e3: SS 2 Lv1 FIRE from own GY. Any 2 of Ash/Oak/Poplar already in GY qualify. Landing 2 Snake-Eyes cascades their on-NS/SS triggers if untriggered this turn. High-confidence edges via SET_SNAKE_EYE + attr FIRE + level 1 filter match. VALIDATOR NOTE (phase 4 2026-04-24): the e3 trigger requires 'sent from field or hand to GY' per oracle text. Deck→GY (via Foolish Burial / Exterio etc.) does NOT satisfy. Mechanically un-validatable via Phase 4 primitives alone — needs a multi-step precursor that first puts Flamberge on field/hand then destroys/discards it (e.g., Evenly Matched, battle destruction, tribute cost). Deferred.

produces.note: 2 Lv1 FIRE bodies SS'd from GY

steps.note: Flamberge sent from hand/field to GY (via combo cost OR opp destroy). Triggers Flamberge.e3.
Flamberge.e3: SS 2 Lv1 FIRE from own GY

bridges.name: Synchro Cupsy★Yummy Way using Link-1 (treated as Lv1 Tuner) + any Lv1 non-Tuner
bridges.description: Cupsy★Yummy Way's non-standard Synchro procedure: treats a Link-1 monster as Lv1 Tuner (via EFFECT_SYNCHRO_LEVEL effect), enabling Synchro Summon using Link-1 (Linkuriboh/Almiraj/Yummy★Snatchy) + any Lv1 non-Tuner. Primary use: Snake-Eye → Link-1 → Cupsy★Way (CW.1 tutors 2 Yummy from Deck). Mechanically verified via Synchro.AddProcedure decomposition + EFFECT_SYNCHRO_LEVEL detection — the clause missed by manual discovery.

steps.note: First Link-Summon a Lv1-friendly Link-1 (Linkuriboh / Almiraj / Snatchy). Requires 1 Snake-Eye body as material.
Synchro: Link-1 (treated-as Lv1 Tuner via EFFECT_SYNCHRO_LEVEL) + any Lv1 non-Tuner on field = Lv2 Synchro Cupsy★Way
CW.1 on-SS: add 2 Yummy cards from deck (Acroquey / Mignon / Cupsy / Marshmao / Cooky depending on deck state)

bridges.name: Doomed Dragon alt-SS via 2 face-up S/T-zone monsters → send to GY
bridges.description: Snake-Eyes Doomed Dragon alt-SS path: requires 2 face-up monsters in own S/T zone → send to GY → SS self. Snake-Eye engine naturally places monsters face-up as Continuous Spells via Poplar SeP.3, Flamberge SeF.1, Divine Temple DT.1, Diabellstar SeD.2. Emerges from EFFECT_SPSUMMON_PROC detection in v3 parser. Alternative ED finisher when standard summon routes blocked.

requiresInitialState.note: Poplar as face-up Continuous Spell (Snake-Eye mechanic via SeP.3)
Flamberge as face-up Continuous Spell (Snake-Eye mechanic)

produces.note: Doomed Dragon SS'd via alt path

steps.note: Alt-SS: 2 face-up monsters in own S/T zone → send to GY → SS Doomed Dragon (Extra Deck)

sourceNotes: v1 (2026-04-23) — Snake-Eye + Yummy hybrid archetype-expertise for snake-eye-yummy-sarcophagus-hollywood-wcq fixture. Authored from mechanical-bridges-catalog-2026-04-23.md (6 bridges: 4 Snake-Eye + Cupsy★Way synchro + Doomed Dragon alt-SS). All bridges are mechanically sourced (edge enumeration on card-effects-catalog v5), not hand-authored. 6 goals cover the canonical apex + 5 waypoints (trio / Cupsy★Way / Poplar / Snake-Eye body / Divine Temple / Flamberge-or-Doomed). 3 routes express hand-start patterns (Ash 1-card, Bonfire alt, Poplar-in-hand). Yummy engine outputs (Lollipo, Acroquey, Cooky★Way) are reached via Cupsy★Way's CW.1 tutor — the grammar graph route-assembly step is expected to chain cupsy-way bridge into Lollipo/Acroquey reveals.
